headline: Israel strikes Hamas financiers as US threatens Iran over Hezbollah
subheadline: IDF eliminated Hamas operatives Hassin Qadra and Mahmoud Fra, halting a network moving over half‑billion shekels from Turkey to Gaza.
lede: Israel’s forces killed senior Hamas figures Hassin Qadra and Mahmoud Fra, disrupting a financing pipeline of more than 0.5 billion shekels from Turkey to Gaza. Hezbollah-linked fighters uncovered a 200‑meter tunnel in Majdal Zoun loaded with hundreds of weapons and four rocket launchers aimed at Israel. In Ukraine, Russian KAB rockets struck Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk and Donetsk, while Russian air defenses downed six UAVs heading toward Moscow. UAV incursions persisted over Kharkiv, Sumy, Chernihiv and Zaporizhzhia, keeping Ukrainian air defenses under strain.

sections.title: Ukrainian Front Faces Escalating Aerial Threats
sections.body: KAB rockets were launched at targets in Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk and Donetsk, intensifying long‑range pressure on Ukrainian rear areas. Russian air defenses intercepted six UAVs bound for Moscow, demonstrating high‑volume aerial contest. UAVs were reported over Kharkiv from the north, over Sumy from the north, and over Zaporizhzhia from the south, adding to the multi‑directional threat. A civilian was killed by an explosive device in Gorlovka, underscoring the hybrid nature of the conflict.

sections.title: Israel Targets Hamas Financiers Amid Iranian Stalemate
sections.body: Israel’s targeted strike eliminated Hamas operatives Hassin Qadra and Mahmoud Fra, who managed a network moving over 0.5 billion shekels from Turkey to Gaza. The IDF lifted civil defense restrictions for several northern Israeli communities, returning them to full activity level. Hezbollah-linked forces discovered a 200‑meter underground tunnel in Majdal Zoun containing hundreds of weapons and four rocket launchers aimed at Israel. Iranian negotiators halted talks in Switzerland after the second meeting with the Qatari team, citing the Lebanon front as a precondition for further dialogue.

sections.title: Intelligence Assessment
sections.body: The elimination of senior Hamas financiers signals a focused Israeli effort to cripple Hamas’s funding, while the armed tunnel in Lebanon shows Hezbollah’s sustained strike capability. Iran’s suspension of Swiss talks, conditioned on the Lebanon situation, combined with US threats over Hezbollah support, raises the risk of broader regional escalation.
